summary: Implemented session cleanup cron job, configuration versioning, and rate limiting for review requests. Changes staged but not committed; review requested before GitHub push.
details: Modified src/config.ts (versioning support), src/escalation-server.ts (connection retry and error handling), src/mcp-server.ts (rate limiting for review requests), src/session-manager.ts (automatic session cleanup and cron job support). All changes ready for commit and push after review. Untracked files (.pingpong/, PRD.md) present in work tree.
